notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, pitcher Michael Wacha to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.
